title: PVPify
description: Minimalist PVP modpack, optimized, vanilla-look, no bannable mods
body:
![A banner for the page that says "PVPify - Finally, a good PVP Modpack"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79174f125a267159ade281d6ef2f29be0a3eb726.png)

# What is it?

PVPify is a minimalist PVP Modpack that just works, optimized, preconfigured settings, some QoL, & a vanilla-look

No bannable mods used. Updating the modpack to a newer version will not change your current settings.

Designed for only the Modrinth Launcher, not to be imported into Lunar Client.

⚠️Note: Marlow's Crystal Optimizer and other optimizers are not included due to it being bannable on certain servers. Also, Shield Statuses is banned on some tierlists. Add them to the modpack **at your own risk.**

**Officially distributed only on Modrinth.** Other downloads are not supported and may be unsafe.

<details>
  <summary>Default Settings</summary>
90 FOV (very common range for PVPers)

View Bobbing -> Off

Damage Tilt -> 5%

FOV Effects -> 0%

Toggle Sprint -> On (necessity!)

Keybinds & Sensitivity -> Your Preference!
</details>


<details>
  <summary>Main Features</summary>

1. Low Shields/Fire
   
2. Armor Durability/HUD
   
3. Crosshair addons (Elytra and Crosshair Indicators)
   
4. Shield Fixes
   
5. Preconfigured and Optimized Settings
   
6. Saturation
   
7. Tiers

8. Totem Count
  
9. Shulkerbox Preview
   
10. Great Preformance

</details>

<details>
  <summary>Why Should I Choose PVPify Over Lunar Client/Other Modpacks?</summary>

1. Other modpacks use bannable mods.
   
2. Significantly more preformance (FPS) for lower-end PC's than Lunar Client.
   
3. More compatibility than Lunar Client.

4. More flexible than Lunar Client because you can add mods more effortlessly.

5. No weird, shady override mods you see in other modpacks.

6. It looks cooler than other modpacks.

7. Many modpacks are just pure lazy, they don't do research, have AI generated descriptions, and they arent as carefully crafted.

8. Its made by Ceyoh [(check out my channel!)](https://www.youtube.com/@ceyohh/shorts)

</details>

**FPS on a low-end laptop**
|  | Vanilla | PVPify | Lunar Client | Fabulously Optimized |
| :--- | :---: | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| FPS | ~30-40 | ~100 | ~50-60 | its worse trust |

## Compatibility
To use Flashback Mod: Remove C2ME & the Very Many Players mod because they break it.

**Any problems or bugs?** Join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/mAuxf4z3RN), or submit an issue ticket [on github](https://github.com/Ceyoh/PVPify/issues).
